one_time_description: Impairment loss on buildings destroyed by wildfires subsequent to year-end; net book value written down to nil
economic_notes: Sturgeon Lake Developments Co. Ltd. and Sturgeon Lake Resources Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method as GBEs. Sturgeon Lake Resources Ltd. had revenue of $9,912,044 in 2023. Nation notified WCTC of intention to withdraw from WCTC and from WCTC Child Youth & Family Enhancement Agency subsequent to year-end.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to asset retirement obligations not being estimated or recorded. Impairment loss of $1,645,493 on buildings destroyed by wildfires recorded (subsequent event recognized in current year financials). Sturgeon Lake Resources Ltd. changed from fully consolidated (2022) to modified equity/GBE treatment (2023), causing significant comparability issues. Nation intends to withdraw from Western Cree Tribal Council subsequent to year-end. Deferred revenue is very large at $35.1M. Total government transfers estimated as WCTC $17,324,011 + ISC Health $4,289,334 + Gov AB $128,544 + CMHC $1,774,403 = $23,516,292. OSR = $27,143,801 - $23,516,292 = $3,627,509. Net financial assets per statement of change in net debt is negative $(7,578,420) indicating net debt position.
